title: Excited States and Spectroscopy
description: Learn how quantum chemistry calculates electronically excited states, the foundation for understanding photochemistry, spectroscopy, and light-harvesting systems.
learningObjectives: Explain the physical meaning of electronic excited states
Distinguish between different methods for computing excited states
Connect calculated energies to experimental spectroscopy
Understand the challenges in modeling photochemistry
Recognize opportunities for quantum computing in excited states
